citations.narrative:
The licensee moved to a new location and failed to notify APHIS Animal Care of the change in address. Upon contacting
the licensee by phone, they stated that they had moved to a new address and were no longer operating at the site
address
Failure to notify Animal Care of a change in location can make it difficult to verify regulated activities.
A licensee shall notify Animal Care no fewer than 90 days before any change in the name, address, management,
substantial control or ownership of his business or operation, locations, activities, and number or type of animals.
Correct by: April 20, 2026.
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with a facility representative.
n

narrative:
2.1(b)(1) 
   
Requirements and application 
The licensee moved to a new location and failed to notify APHIS Animal Care of the change in address. Upon contacting 
the licensee by phone, they stated that they had moved to a new address and were no longer operating at the site 
address 
Failure to notify Animal Care of a change in location can make it difficult to verify regulated activities. 
A licensee shall notify Animal Care no fewer than 90 days before any change in the name, address, management, 
substantial control or ownership of his business or operation, locations, activities, and number or type of animals. 
Correct by: April 20, 2026. 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with a facility representative.
